title: Aved Luun

'''Aved Luun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], she and her mate [[Kalit/Legends|Kalit]] led a [[Kalit's clan|clan]] that almost got into a war with another [[Wittin's clan|clan]] led by Jawas [[Wittin/Legends|Wittin]] and [[Herat]], who arranged raids and stealing salvaged goods from other Jawas and accused Luun and Kalit's clan for the actions.

Those tensions led to Kalit attempting to use Tatooine's [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] as a mediator for the conflicts with Wittin and Herat. Luun frequented the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]], where Kalit went alongside Herat and Wittin to resolve their conflicts prior to 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY's]] [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]]. Luun suspected Wittin's betrayal—while indeed Herat and Wittin were plotting to have Jabba's help in conquering her and Kalit's clan, to Kalit's good fortune, the subsequent Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon led to Wittin's [[Death/Legends|death]].

==Biography==
[[File:Kalit_SWI_60.jpg|thumb|left|214px|Kalit, Aved Luun's mate]]
Aved Luun was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] native to her<ref name="DB" /> [[Species/Legends|species']] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|143|Jawa}}</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="DB" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> she had become a [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] as well as the mate of [[Kalit/Legends|Kalit]],<ref name="FF" /> a Jawa [[Chief/Legends|chief]]<ref name="Who's Who">{{InsiderCite|60|Who's Who in Jabba's Palace}}</ref> and [[King/Legends|king]].<ref name="CSWE Iasa">{{CSWECite|II|74|Iasa}}</ref> Luun and Kalit led a [[Kalit's clan|clan]] together.<ref name="FF" />

By 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> Luun and Kalit's clan had conflicts with a rival [[Wittin's clan|clan]] led by the Jawas [[Wittin/Legends|Wittin]] and [[Herat]] that almost led to a war. Wittin's clan stole salvaged goods and [[Water/Legends|water]], and organized raids on other Jawas, with the help of [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit]],<ref name="FF" /> another of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] Jawas.<ref name="anh">{{Film|IV}}</ref> Wittin falsely accused Kalit's clan of staging the raids, which continued alongside the accusations even as the Jawa elders believed Kalit's innocence. Kalit approached Tatooine's [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]<ref name="FF" />—whose [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] and excursions on the [[Luxury-class sail barge|luxury sail barge]] [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']] would both include Luun's physical presence<ref name="DB" />—to mediate their conflicts.<ref name="FF" />

Luun suspected Wittin's betrayal<ref name="CCG" /> around the [[Time/Legends|time]] that Kalit was present in Jabba's Palace along with both Wittin and Herat when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] unrelatedly [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] to rescue one of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="rotj">{{Film|VI}}</ref> While Wittin and Herat indeed planned to have Jabba help them conquer Kalit and Luun's clan,<ref name="Who's Who" /> to Kalit's good fortune, the events that followed Solo's rescue attempts led to the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]] and Wittin's [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="FF" />

==Personality and traits==
Aved Luun had [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Skills and abilities==
Luun had a degree of [[Force-attunement]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Equipment==
Luun wore brown Jawa [[Robe/Legends|robes]] with a [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]] strapped across the chest.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:HetNkikwithotherJawa.jpg|thumb|214px|The promotional image through which Aved Luun's origins lie]]
Aved Luun's origins lie within a production photo for [[1983]]'s [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="rotjgcc">''[[Return of the Jedi Giant Collector's Compendium: Heroes, Villains, Creatures & Droids]]''</ref> She was first mentioned in the [[1998]] ''[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], which used a modified image of one of the Jawas in the aforementioned photo.<ref name="CCG" />
